calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-17-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-01-2023 Continued To Jul-17-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for Tania Portocarrero.

Mr. Wrobel stated that the inventory and appraisal was sent over to the probate referee, that the delay is because they have an extensive rare coin collection and that the client had a difficult time getting it appraised. Status on close of estate is continued to July 17, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Wrobel's petition for final distribution is to be given a hearing date of July 17, 2023.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
